title: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary_full: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.
summary_public: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.
